---
title: Lyon
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1757937728/lyon2_kxoyzv.png
description: Ville de Lyon, parc de la Tête d'Or
categories: ["urbansketch"]
date: 2025/05/06
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1757937728/lyon2_kxoyzv.png)
